author: Nguyễn Văn Duy
description: Red-DiscordBot cogs for preserve-first Discord server reconciliation and GitHub-to-Discord development workflow automation.
install_msg: Repository added. Run `[p]cog list red-cogs`, then install `imperialsetup` and/or `developmentops`. Read each cog's documentation before enabling mutating actions or exposing a webhook receiver.
short: Discord infrastructure and GitHub workflow automation for Red.
